global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a clear focus on savings and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute savings on hotels and flights.

elements.label: DriftPass logo
elements.description: A small logo featuring the text 'DriftPass' in a modern font, positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Main savings message
elements.description: A prominent text area displaying 'Last-minute savings' in bold, large font, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Additional offer details
elements.description: A smaller text area below the main message that reads 'Hotels + flights in one tap', providing more context.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rectangular button with the text 'Start now' in bold, inviting users to take action, located below the main message.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: Abstract shapes in the background, including an oval and a rectangle, adding visual interest without being the main focus.

elements.label: Additional visual element
elements.description: A large, abstract shape that is visually appealing but does not convey specific information.

elements.label: Secondary decorative element
elements.description: Another abstract shape that complements the overall design, positioned centrally.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' indicating user-generated content, positioned at the top right.

elements.label: Secondary UGC tag
elements.description: A smaller tag positioned near the UGC label, providing additional context but not essential information.

elements.label: Overall background
elements.description: A solid green background that provides a vibrant and inviting atmosphere for the ad.
elements.text_content: Last-minute savings Hotele tap Start now

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the main message is centered, and the CTA is below the main message.
